query:
insert into equipment_items
            (kind, canonical_name, display_name, usage_count, status, approved_at,
             brand, model)
            values ('filter', 'astronomik h-alpha 6nm 2"', 'Astronomik H-alpha 6nm 2"',
                    3, 'approved', now(), 'Astronomik', 'H-alpha 6nm 2"')
            returning id
